meaning: n.[植]扇叶树头榈(亦作 palmyra palm,palmyra tree)
examples: In December, 2003, Christopher was living in the town of Palmyra.
Palmyra was in the ancient times an important city of central Syria.
The Palmyra Hotel in Baalbek has doubles from $107, including breakfast.
Earlier, reports said bombings in the town of Palmyra killed 19 people.
Then there is the ancient city of Palmyra, another Unesco World Heritage site, whose ruins lay scattered across a desert oasis 150 miles northeast of Damascus.
